problem id: 7877dd7f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  11111110 -> 11111101
  11001101 -> 11011011
  10100101 -> 01001011
  11110101 -> 11101011
  10111111 -> 11111111
  01001000 -> 10010000
  10000011 -> 11000111
  00001110 -> 10011100

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 11101000
